provisions.title: Title
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Immigration and Deportation Act (Fees) (Waiver) Regulations, 2000.

provisions.title: Waiver of fees
provisions.content: The fees payable under regulation 3 of the Immigration and Deportation Regulations are hereby waived in respect of the Class of persons specified in the Schedule. [ Cap. 123 P.2] Schedule (Paragraph 2) Personnel from China who have been employed by the Ministry of lnformation and Broadcasting Services for Installation of FM Radio Transmitters in pursuance of an Agreement between the Governments of the Republic of China and the Republic of Zambia.
